$comment: Derived from Claude Code production source: src/Tool.ts buildTool() factory + TOOL_DEFAULTS object (lines 757-792)
title: Olympus Agent Definition Schema
description: Formal schema for agent .md frontmatter. Mirrors Claude Code's buildTool() pattern where TOOL_DEFAULTS provides safe defaults and buildTool() spreads user definition over them.

name.description: Agent identifier (lowercase, no hyphens). Maps to subagent_type: 'olympus:{name}'

disallowedTools.description: Tools this agent cannot use. Ported from Claude Code's getDenyRuleForTool() pattern (src/utils/permissions/permissions.ts:287-292)

defaults.$comment: Ported from TOOL_DEFAULTS (src/Tool.ts:757-769). These fields have safe defaults and need not be specified in agent .md files.

isReadOnly.description: TOOL_DEFAULTS.isReadOnly: () => false. Auto-derived: true if disallowedTools includes Write AND Edit

isConcurrencySafe.description: TOOL_DEFAULTS.isConcurrencySafe: () => false. Whether this agent can run in parallel safely.

maxResultSizeChars.description: Maximum output size from this agent's SendMessage

derivedProperties.$comment: Properties computed at runtime, not specified in frontmatter. Mirrors buildTool() spread pattern.

subagentType.description: Computed: 'olympus:{name}'. Used in skill SKILL.md for subagent_type binding.

permissionLevel.description: Computed from disallowedTools: 'read-only' if [Write,Edit] included, 'write' if [Edit] only, 'full' if []

checkPermissions.description: Ported from TOOL_DEFAULTS.checkPermissions (line 763-766): default is allow. Override in agent .md Investigation Protocol section with explicit tool usage constraints.

validationRules.$comment: Rules enforced by /olympus:audit skill. Ported from Claude Code's validateInput() pattern.

rules.description: If disallowedTools includes Write/Edit, agent prompt must NOT contain file-writing instructions
If isReadOnly=true, agent Tool_Usage must include SendMessage and Final_Checklist must mention orchestrator handoff
Complex reasoning tasks (evaluation, analysis, planning) should use opus. Execution tasks can use sonnet. Simple discovery can use haiku.
Every tool in disallowedTools must be absent from the agent's Tool_Usage section

agentRegistry.$comment: Ported from Claude Code's getAllBaseTools() pattern (src/tools.ts). Known agents with their configurations.
